title: CustomField
description: A custom field value on a task.

type.description: The type of the custom field.

type_config.description: Configuration specific to the custom field type.

date_created.description: Unix timestamp when the custom field was created.

hide_from_guests.description: Whether the field is hidden from guests.

value.description: The current value of the custom field.

required.description: Whether the custom field is required.
